race.comment: BRIAL ROSE (6) took advantage of a low draw last time when she led throughout for a comfortable victory over 1000m at this track. Will benefit again with the claim and prove hard to run down. SWIFT HIT (7) anchored with the 59.5kg first-up with a fighting third over 1000m at this track. Has excellent second-up form and has genuine winning claims with the 3kg apprentice aboard. TESORO MIO (4) consistent filly set a difficult task today from a wide gate. Returned from a let-up with a battling ninth over 1000m at Mornington. Will appreciate the 3kg claim. RISKY WHISKY (9) is still lightly raced with upside and could be close to another win following back-to-back placings.
